assertions.assertion: Sets RequireDPoP = true on the client configuration
assertions.rationale: RequireDPoP = true is set on dpop_client.

assertions.assertion: Sets DPoPClockSkew to TimeSpan.FromMinutes(2) on the client
Explains that DPoP binds the token to the client's key via the cnf claim with a jkt (JWK thumbprint) value
assertions.rationale: Explains cnf claim with jkt thumbprint, shows JSON example.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that DPoP requires Enterprise Edition and version >= 6.3
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'DPoP requires Enterprise Edition of Duende IdentityServer (version >= 6.3)'.

assertions.assertion: Client still uses AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials with a shared secret, demonstrating DPoP is separate from client authentication
assertions.rationale: Client uses GrantTypes.ClientCredentials with shared secret. Explicitly states DPoP is separate from client authentication.
